message:
fix(tests): correct dropin requirement IDs in config and CLI selection tests

Update dropin requirement ID references from incorrect IDs to correct ones:
- config_precedence: dropin174 → dropin142 for config surface log requirement
- main_cli_selection: dropin174 → dropin141 for CLI surface log requirement

Ensures test requirement identifiers accurately map to their specification IDs,
preventing false traceability when verifying dropin compliance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
